lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Beluga Liner ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Beluga Liner
sources.what: Stock hull stats, passenger-cabin/internal layout, and module sellers for this ship.

sources.label: Fandom — Beluga Liner
sources.what: Manufacturer (Saud Kruger), luxury-cabin role, and lore reference for the Beluga Liner.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Deep-dive review of the Saud Kruger Beluga Liner as a luxury passenger hauler, covering cabin capacity and mission economics.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Review of the pre-built jumpstart Beluga Liner, weighing its fit-out and cost against its value for passenger work.
